headline: These 4 Dividend Growers Have Already Declared 10% Dividend Increases
summary: Morningstar’s Investing Insights podcast recently spotlighted four S&P 500 stocks that have already declared dividend increases of 10% or more, effectively locking in their place on next year’s Dividend Growers screen, which requires companies to grow dividends at least 10% annually. headline: Pinterest Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Revenue Growth
summary: PINS tops Q1 estimates as AI-driven ads and advertiser demand lift revenue 18% and users to 631M, while Performance+ adoption and margins gain.

raw.headline: Pinterest Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Revenue Growth

headline: Cogent Reports Narrower-Than-Expected Q1 Loss Despite Lower Revenues
summary: CCOI reports mixed Q1 2026 as loss narrows and beats estimates, but revenues dip as off-net weakness outweighs gains in on-net and wavelength services.

raw.headline: Cogent Reports Narrower-Than-Expected Q1 Loss Despite Lower Revenues

headline: Lattice's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Revenue Growth
summary: LSCC posts Q1 surge as AI-driven FPGA demand lifts revenues 42%, beating estimates and boosting earnings outlook.

headline: ADTRAN Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Revenue Growth
summary: ADTN tops Q1 estimates with strong revenue growth, margin expansion and rising demand across fiber, cloud and AI-driven networking markets.
